arts.ttl: Chelsea youngster Caleb Wiley set to join Championship side Watford until the end of the season - after Blues cut short Strasbourg loan
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The American has been on loan at the Blues' sister club Strasbourg for the first half of the campaign, where he has made just six appearances.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s Caleb Wiley set to join Watford as Strasbourg loan is terminated
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Chelsea defender Caleb Wiley (20) is set to join Watford on loan until the end of the season. The American international has been on loan at Strasbourg for…

arts.ttl: Preview: Watford vs. Norwich City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Watford and Norwich City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
